name: J.C. Financial Concepts LLC
description_short: Black-owned accounting and financial consulting firm in Columbus offering tax preparation, bookkeeping, and financial coaching to individuals and small businesses.
description_long:
J.C. Financial Concepts, LLC is a Columbus-based accounting and financial consulting firm that identifies itself as a Black-owned business. Founded to serve a diverse clientele ranging from individual consumers to small business owners, the company positions itself as an accessible alternative to larger accounting firms. The firm operates from 2101 S Hamilton Rd, Suite 105 in Columbus, Ohio 43232.

The company offers a comprehensive suite of financial services including tax planning, tax consulting, tax preparation, bookkeeping, financial education, and business tax workshops. Their service mix suggests they cater to both personal tax needs and small business accounting requirements. The emphasis on financial education and workshops indicates a focus on client financial literacy and empowerment, not merely transactional tax filing.

J.C. Financial Concepts distinguishes itself through its Black-owned business designation and apparent commitment to financial education as part of their service model. The inclusion of financial coaching and educational workshops suggests a consultative approach beyond basic tax preparation, positioning them as advisors rather than just preparers. Their focus on serving small businesses and individuals indicates local market knowledge and accessibility.

Based on available information, the company appears to be a legitimate, established local accounting firm. However, there is limited online presence beyond the business directory listing, no independent website, and minimal verifiable client reviews or credentials displayed. The 404 errors on related pages suggest incomplete directory listings. The business serves accounting and tax needs rather than consumer finance products, making it most suitable for tax and bookkeeping assistance rather than credit or lending solutions.
pros: Black-owned business providing financial services to underserved markets
Offers financial education and workshops, not just tax filing
Serves both individuals and small businesses with tailored solutions
Provides financial coaching alongside traditional accounting services
Established local presence in Columbus with physical office location
Specializes in business tax planning, valuable for entrepreneurs
Bookkeeping services provide ongoing financial management, not one-time help
cons: No independent website or online presence beyond business directory listing
Limited verifiable information about credentials, certifications, or experience
No customer reviews or testimonials available to assess service quality
High likelihood of miscategorization suggests incomplete or outdated business profile
Does not offer consumer finance products, lending, or credit services despite 'business-loans' categorization
best_for: Small business owners needing tax planning and bookkeeping support
Individuals seeking financial education and tax consultation from a local, Black-owned firm
Columbus-area clients preferring in-person accounting and financial coaching services
Business owners wanting workshop-based financial education and compliance support
diagnosis: J.C. Financial Concepts is best for Columbus-area individuals and small business owners seeking tax preparation, bookkeeping, and financial education from a local Black-owned accounting firm. The main caveat is that this is an accounting/tax service provider, not a consumer finance company—it does not offer loans, credit repair, debt relief, or financial products, making the 'business-loans' categorization inaccurate. Prospective clients should verify current credentials and service availability directly by phone.
services: Tax preparation for individuals and businesses
